summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Funnel Light feature. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All 10 frontend features verified working correctly. The new step order (Posizionamento → Funnel Light → Masterclass) is correctly implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: FunnelLightPage.jsx correctly implements all required features: hero, sections, generate/publish/regenerate buttons
Backend GET /api/partner-journey/funnel-light/{partner_id} returns correct structure with funnel_light data or null
Backend POST /api/partner-journey/funnel-light/generate creates landing, form, thankyou content from positioning data
Backend POST /api/partner-journey/funnel-light/publish marks funnel as published with URL (academy.evolution-pro.it placeholder)
stepConfig.js correctly defines 6 steps: posizionamento, funnel-light, masterclass, videocorso, funnel, lancio
PHASE_ACTIONS F2 correctly updated to 'Attiva il tuo primo funnel' instead of 'Crea struttura corso'
Hero shows 'Attiva il tuo primo funnel' with correct subtitle
Three sections displayed: Landing Page Webinar, Form Contatti, Thank You Page
Published banner shows 'Funnel pubblicato' with 'Apri funnel' link when published
'Prosegui alla Masterclass' CTA appears after publishing

All data-testid attributes present: funnel-light-hero, generate-funnel-light, publish-funnel-light, regenerate-funnel-light, continue-to-masterclass, section-landing, section-form, section-thankyou, funnel-published-banner
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - Partner 2 (Arianna Aceto) already has funnel generated and published, Partner 3 (Marco Orlandi) used for generation flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Funnel Light feature fully tested. Navigation: Login as admin → Click 'Vista Partner' → Select partner (e.g., Arianna Aceto) → Click 'Funnel Light' in sidebar (step 2). Features: 1) Hero with 'Attiva il tuo primo funnel', 2) Generate button creates landing/form/thankyou content, 3) Publish button marks funnel live with URL, 4) Published banner with 'Apri funnel' link, 5) 'Prosegui alla Masterclass' CTA after publishing. Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/partner-journey/funnel-light/{partner_id}, POST /generate, POST /publish. Step order: Posizionamento(1) → Funnel Light(2) → Masterclass(3) → Videocorso(4) → Funnel di Vendita(5) → Lancio(6). MOCKED: Funnel URL (academy.evolution-pro.it) is a placeholder.

mocked_apis_list: Funnel URL (academy.evolution-pro.it/{partner_id}/webinar) is a placeholder - actual URL will be configured when Systeme.io integration is complete
